name: System Process Launched from Unusual Directory
notes: This rule triggers when a system process is launched from an unusual directory.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
when the event matches Process Name IMATCHES '((smss)|(wininit)|(taskhost)|(lsass)|(winlogon)|(explorer)|(lsm)|(svchost)|(services)|(csrss)|(cmd)|(iexplore))\.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches REFERENCEMAPSETCONTAINS('ProcessMaptoProcessPath', LOWER("Process Name"), LOWER("Process Path")) != True AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY System Process Launched from Unusual Directory on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
AND when the event matches Process Name IMATCHES '((smss)|(wininit)|(taskhost)|(lsass)|(winlogon)|(explorer)|(lsm)|(svchost)|(services)|(csrss)|(cmd)|(iexplore))\.exe' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches REFERENCEMAPSETCONTAINS('ProcessMaptoProcessPath', LOWER("Process Name"), LOWER("Process Path")) != True AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: System Process Started from Unusual Directory
Event description: System Process Started from Unusual Directory
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
